channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Giannis, Bucks use 3-point barrage to beat Thunder 97-81 for NBA Cup title
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Everyone has a lucky number in Las Vegas. For the Milwaukee Bucks, it was 3. And the NBA Cup was their prize.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Michael Vick accepts head coaching job at Norfolk State
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — Michael Vick has agreed to become the head coach at Norfolk State in a return to football for the former NFL star, who has never coached at any level. The 44-year-old Vick announced on his Facebook page on Tuesday night that he has accepted the job.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes roll past Florida A&M, 89-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's last home game of 2024 was a memorable one, as the Utes cruised past Florida A&M, 89-59. Mike Sharavjamts and Mason Madsen each scored 15 points off the bench to lead a balanced Utah attack. The Utes bench scored 57 points, while the starters scored 32.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Auburn standout center Johni Broome injures right shoulder in victory over Georgia State
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Auburn standout center Johni Broome left Tuesday night's win over Georgia State early in the first half after injuring his right shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Falcons name rookie Michael Penix Jr. as starting QB, benching veteran Kirk Cousins
item.description: The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NBA announces All-Star tournament plan for this season: 4 teams, 3 games, 1 night
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco. And scoring is sure to be down — way, way, way down.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: MLB study: Velocity, max efforts likely causing pitching injuries; rule changes should be considered
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A yearlong study by Major League Baseball concluded rising velocities, pitch shaping and emphasis on maximum effort are the likely causes of the vast increase in pitcher injuries and recommended exploring rules changes to address the problem.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: New York Yankees acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from Cubs for pitcher Cody Poteet
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Outfielder Cody Bellinger was acquired by the New York Yankees from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet. Chicago will send the Yankees $5 million as part of the trade.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers suggests JFK assassination piqued his interest in politics, 'disheartened' with two-party system
item.description: New York Jets star Aaron Rodgers revealed to Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. that his uncle's assassination piqued his interest in politics. The revelation was made in "Enigma.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Star receiver Nick Nash won’t play for SJSU in Hawaii Bowl
item.description: Nick Nash, the former quarterback who led the nation in receptions, receiving yards and receiving touchdowns this season, will not play in San Jose State's bowl game next week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Seth Moulton says he's talked to trans people who support trans exclusion from women's sports
item.description: Seth Moulton has faced harsh backlash for speaking out against trans athletes, but also claims certain transgender people have said they agree with him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox announce list of players to attend SoxFest 2025
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced a list of seven players and eight prospects who will join fans at SoxFest 2025, which is making its return after a four-year hiatus, featuring new fan experiences and a "State of the White Sox" address with Manager Will Venable and front office leadership.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Soccer: Our Lady of Peace 6, Patrick Henry 3
item.description: Holiday Jubilee tournament in girls soccer OLP facing off against Patrick Henry. OLP took home the 6-3 victory.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 84-year-old continues lawn bowling despite vision loss
item.description: On most days, you can find Ralph Trinity rolling with the Oaks North Lawn Bowling Club in Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Isaac Wilson decides to return to Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Upon second thought, Isaac Wilson is returning to Utah. Eight days after announcing he was entering the transfer portal, Wilson announced that he is returning to Utah, where will compete for the starting quarterback job with New Mexico transfer Devon Dampier.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — By adding Dennis Schroder, the Golden State Warriors believe they have found the perfect backcourt mate to complement Stephen Curry. Curry can't wait to get going in what he expects to be a “seamless transition for him.” “It can help me, it can help us,” Curry said.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Josh Allen has another huge game to lift Bills to a 48-42 victory that snaps Lions' winning streak
item.description: Allen ran for two scores in the first quarter and threw two touchdown passes in the second half, leading the Buffalo Bills to a 48-42 victory Sunday that snapped the Detroit Lions ' franchise-record 11-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: Mahomes threw two touchdown passes before limping off with an ankle injury in the fourth quarter, Xavier Worthy ran for a score and Kansas City finally had a relatively easy win, 21-7 over the mistake-prone Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Miami Dolphins wide receiver Grant DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head
item.description: Grant DuBose, who returned Sunday after a shoulder injury sidelined him for part of the season, was listed as being in stable condition.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Game-worn Wilt Chamberlain Lakers jersey sells for $333K at auction
item.description: A game-worn Wilt Chamberlain jersey from the 1970-71 Los Angeles Lakers playoff run sold for $333,601 at Grey Flannel Auctions’ holiday auction this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
